Main Subject:
A woman with light skin and brown hair pulled back and styled in loose volume stands or sits upright facing forward, looking toward the camera with a relaxed expression. She wears a light blue bikini-style top with thin straps and a small central cutout, and a white wrap or draped piece at the waist. Her left arm rests near her lap while her right arm extends outward along the edge of a boat.

Setting:
The scene is outdoors beside a body of water, with blue-green water filling most of the background. In the distance, there is a strip of green vegetation or trees along the far shoreline, under bright daylight with soft, even lighting.

Visual Details:
The camera angle is slightly above and front-facing, centered on her upper body and face. The water behind her shows small ripples and wave texture. The boat edge is visible in the lower portion of the image, with a dark blue fabric or panel and a partially visible object near the left side that looks like a black device with red and small components.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a woman posing on a boat near the shoreline. She is wearing a light blue bikini top and a white lower garment while looking at the camera against a backdrop of water and greenery.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
